questions.question: Which three countries asked Trump to "hold off" on a previously unannounced attack on Iran?
options: Egypt, Jordan, and Oman
Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and the United Arab Emirates
Turkey, Bahrain, and Kuwait
Israel, the United Kingdom, and France
questions.explanation: Trump postponed the planned attack after requests from Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and the United Arab Emirates. He still told military leaders to stay ready for a full assault if talks failed.

questions.question: Which Republican senator Trump helped defeat in Louisiana after the senator voted to convict him following Jan. 6?
options: Bill Cassidy
John Kennedy
Tom Cotton
Susan Collins
questions.explanation: Bill Cassidy finished third in Louisiana's Republican Senate primary after Trump backed Rep. Julia Letlow. Trump celebrated Cassidy's loss and said his political career was over.

questions.question: What was the main purpose of the AI executive order Trump postponed hours before a White House signing ceremony?
options: To ban U.S. companies from exporting advanced chips to China
To create a voluntary federal review process for cybersecurity risks in advanced AI models before release
To require all federal agencies to use only American-made AI systems
To criminalize the publication of open-source frontier AI models
questions.explanation: The draft order would have created a voluntary federal review process to test advanced AI models for cybersecurity risks before they were released publicly. Trump said he disliked certain aspects and worried it could slow the U.S. against China.

questions.question: Under Trump's Justice Department settlement over leaked tax records, who would receive a formal apology but no money?
options: Only Trump personally
Trump, his sons, and the Trump Organization
All Jan. 6 defendants who applied to the commission
Former IRS employees involved in the leak case
questions.explanation: The settlement said Trump, his sons, and the Trump Organization would receive a formal apology but no payout. The broader $1.776 billion fund was created for other people claiming political targeting by the government.

questions.question: What did futures markets put the odds at for at least one Federal Reserve rate hike by year-end?
questions.explanation: Futures markets put the odds of at least one rate hike by year-end at 60%. The warning came as inflation remained well above the Fed's 2% target.

questions.question: Who did Trump endorse in Texas' Republican Senate runoff, angering Senate Republicans?
options: John Cornyn
James Talarico
Ken Paxton
Ted Cruz
questions.explanation: Trump endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton over Sen. John Cornyn. Republicans worried Paxton could endanger a seat they would normally expect to hold.

questions.question: Why did Senate Republicans abandon plans to pass Trump's $70 billion ICE and Border Patrol funding bill?
options: Democrats filibustered the bill after a floor protest
The White House withdrew all immigration funding requests
The Justice Department tried to attach a $1.776 billion anti-weaponization fund that senators said was poorly explained
The Congressional Budget Office said the bill would increase the deficit by $500 billion
questions.explanation: Senate Republicans dropped the bill after the Justice Department tried to add Trump's $1.776 billion anti-weaponization fund. Senators said basic questions about how claims would work went unanswered.

questions.question: What did the Senate vote to advance regarding Trump's military action against Iran?
options: A declaration of war against Iran
A sanctions package targeting Iran's oil exports
A war powers resolution requiring Trump to end military action without congressional authorization
A treaty guaranteeing military support for Israel
questions.explanation: The Senate advanced a war powers resolution that would require Trump to end military action against Iran unless Congress authorized it. Four Republicans joined Democrats after seven failed attempts to move it forward.

questions.question: What additional protection for Trump was included in the Justice Department's expanded IRS settlement addendum?
options: It required Congress to approve any future audit of a sitting president
It permanently barred the IRS from pursuing audits of Trump, related individuals, and affiliated businesses
It transferred all tax disputes involving Trump to the Supreme Court
It forgave all federal tax liabilities for the Trump Organization through 2030
questions.explanation: The addendum said the IRS is "FOREVER BARRED and PRECLUDED" from pursuing examinations of Trump, related or affiliated individuals, and related trusts and businesses. It went beyond the original anti-weaponization fund settlement.

questions.question: What did the DNC's draft 2024 election autopsy say Trump’s “Kamala is for they/them” ad did to Harris?
options: It left her boxed in
It boosted her support with suburban women
It had little measurable effect on voters
It helped her reclaim support in rural counties
questions.explanation: The draft autopsy said the ad was “very effective” and left Harris “boxed” in. The report also argued that Democrats misread key weaknesses in their campaign.
